---
title: "Perils Database"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-inner}
:::{.hero-subtitle}
Real-time tracking of environmental risks across the world.
:::
:::
:::

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Load the environmental risk data
data = FileAttachment("data/environmental_risks.csv").csv({ typed: true })

// Get unique values for filters
regions = ["All Regions", ...new Set(data.map(d => d.region))]
riskTypes = ["All Types", ...new Set(data.map(d => d.risk_type))]
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

## 🌍 Map View

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}

::: {.filter-section}
### Filters
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof selectedRegion = Inputs.select(regions, {
  label: "Region",
  value: "All Regions"
})

viewof selectedRiskType = Inputs.select(riskTypes, {
  label: "Risk Type",
  value: "All Types"
})

viewof minRiskScore = Inputs.range([0, 10], {
  label: "Minimum Risk Score",
  value: 0,
  step: 0.5
})
```
:::

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Filter data based on user selections
filteredData = data.filter(d => {
  const regionMatch = selectedRegion === "All Regions" || d.region === selectedRegion
  const riskMatch = selectedRiskType === "All Types" || d.risk_type === selectedRiskType
  const scoreMatch = d.risk_score >= minRiskScore
  return regionMatch && riskMatch && scoreMatch
})
```

::: {.kpi-grid}
::: {.stat-card style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e74c3c, #c0392b);"}
### ${filteredData.length}
Total Risk Events
:::

::: {.stat-card style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f39c12, #d68910);"}
### ${d3.format(".1f")(d3.mean(filteredData, d => d.risk_score))}
Average Risk Score
:::

::: {.stat-card style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #27ae60, #229954);"}
### ${d3.format(".2s")(d3.sum(filteredData, d => d.population_affected))}
People Affected
:::
:::

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-9}

### World Map

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Leaflet CSS
html`<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>`
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
leaflet = require("leaflet@1.9.4")
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
mapDisplay = {
  const container = html`<div class="map-container"><div class="map-inner"></div></div>`
  yield container

  // Initialize map on the inner element
  const map = leaflet.map(container.querySelector(".map-inner")).setView([20, 0], 2)

  leaflet.tileLayer("https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png", {
    attribution: "© OpenStreetMap contributors",
    maxZoom: 18
  }).addTo(map)

  const colors = {
    Flood: "#3498db",
    Drought: "#f39c12",
    Wildfire: "#e74c3c",
    Storm: "#9b59b6"
  }

  filteredData.forEach(d => {
    leaflet.circleMarker([d.lat, d.lon], {
      radius: d.risk_score * 2.5,
      fillColor: colors[d.risk_type] ?? "#64748b",
      color: "#fff",
      weight: 2,
      fillOpacity: 0.7
    })
      .bindPopup(`
        <b>${d.country}</b><br>
        Type: ${d.risk_type}<br>
        Score: ${d.risk_score}/10<br>
        Affected: ${d3.format(",")(d.population_affected)}
      `)
      .addTo(map)
  })

  setTimeout(() => map.invalidateSize(), 100)
}
```
#### Legend

<div class="legend">
  <span class="legend-item">Flood</span>
  <span class="legend-item">Drought</span>
  <span class="legend-item">Wildfire</span>
  <span class="legend-item">Storm</span>
</div>

:::

:::

## 📊 Analytics

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Risk Distribution by Type
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 60,
  marginBottom: 60,
  x: { label: "Risk Type" },
  y: { label: "Count" },
  marks: [
    Plot.barY(
      filteredData,
      Plot.groupX({ y: "count" }, { x: "risk_type", fill: "risk_type", tip: true })
    ),
    Plot.ruleY([0])
  ],
  color: {
    domain: ["Flood", "Drought", "Wildfire", "Storm"],
    range: ["#3498db", "#f39c12", "#e74c3c", "#9b59b6"]
  }
})
```
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Average Risk Score by Region
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 120,
  marginBottom: 60,
  x: { label: "Average Risk Score" },
  y: { label: "Region" },
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(
      filteredData,
      Plot.groupY({ x: "mean" }, { y: "region", x: "risk_score", tip: true })
    ),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```
:::

::: {.g-col-12}
### Population Affected by Country (Top 15)
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
topCountries = filteredData
  .slice()
  .sort((a, b) => b.population_affected - a.population_affected)
  .slice(0, 15)

Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 100,
  marginBottom: 60,
  height: 400,
  x: { label: "Population Affected", tickFormat: "~s" },
  y: { label: "Country" },
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(topCountries, {
      x: "population_affected",
      y: "country",
      fill: "risk_type",
      tip: true,
      sort: { y: "x", reverse: true }
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ],
  color: {
    domain: ["Flood", "Drought", "Wildfire", "Storm"],
    range: ["#3498db", "#f39c12", "#e74c3c", "#9b59b6"]
  }
})
```
:::

:::

## 📋 Data Table
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Inputs.table(filteredData, {
  columns: ["country", "region", "risk_type", "risk_score", "population_affected"],
  header: {
    country: "Country",
    region: "Region",
    risk_type: "Risk Type",
    risk_score: "Risk Score",
    population_affected: "Population Affected"
  },
  format: {
    population_affected: d => d3.format(",")(d)
  },
  width: {
    country: 150,
    region: 120,
    risk_type: 110,
    risk_score: 110,
    population_affected: 170
  }
})
```

:::

---

**Data Source:** Simulated environmental risk data for demonstration purposes. Last updated: 2026.
